FLAGSTAFF, Ariz., 2018, Immediate Release Coconino National Forest will temporarily close large areas public access beginning Wednesday (May a.m. fire danger public safety.
Areas outside closures will remain Stage Fire Restrictions.
these areas, four located Flagstaff Ranger District, Mogollon Ranger District, Rock Ranger District.
maps these specific closure areas boundaries, please click links image above.
Forest closures kind taken lightly, they affect many people, partner agencies, projects, permit holders, prior plans, public.
Everyone prohibited from entering forest closure areas including Forest Service personnel, unless they responding wildfire other emergency patrolling ensure enforcement closure.
Work thinning other forest watershed restoration projects ceases within forest closure areas.
Partner agencies, organizations, concessionaires, outfitters, permit holders, contractors, including utilities, prohibited from entering forest make repairs work infrastructure running through national forest.
Access only obtained special permit authorized district ranger.
Leaving trailers, vehicles, personal property other objects, including tents, forest purpose reserving campsite storing property illegal violation Title 36CFR 261.10(f).
addition, leaving property unattended 72-hours considered abandoned property impounded Forest Service.
Vulnerability: Areas that most vulnerable fire suppression efforts inaccessibility, limited resources, difficult evacuate people quickly safely.
Values risk from wildfire: Values such life, private property, communities, critical watersheds, trailheads, campgrounds, utility corridors, critical infrastructure, etc.
Topography: Areas with steep slopes canyons that difficult access effectively suppress wildfires, which often align with traditional wind directions.
Cohesiveness with neighboring national forests: Coconino borders several other national forests, which have implemented closure areas that abut boundary Coconino
consistent areas across boundaries reduce confusion.
Closures fire restrictions will lifted when sufficient precipitation received adequately reduce risk wildfire, hot, weather conditions forecast continue.
closure across entire national forest implemented future conditions persist without precipitation.
Violating closures fire restrictions violation that carries mandatory appearance federal court, punishable Class misdemeanor with fine $5,000 individual $10,000 organization, months prison, both.
further information about fire restrictions Coconino National Forest, please call Fire Restriction Hotline 928-226-4607.

Energy's offices, customer service centers, call center will closed both Thursday, November Friday, November observance Thanksgiving holiday.
customer experiencing natural electric emergency call 210-353-HELP (4357).
Rural customers call 1-800-870-1006.
customer service centers, located following addresses, will resume their regular schedules 7:30 a.m. Monday, December
Energy customers reminded that they business online through Manage Account anytime, including holidays weekends.
Services available include: start/stop service, transfer service, update mailing address, make payment arrangements, payment plan other options.
During holiday closure, customers also receive general billing information calling automated phone system 210-353-2222.
addition, Energy's social media sites will minimally monitored through long holiday weekend.

Heading into Budget, Chancellor Hammond under pressure deliver some better news economy.
Unfortunately, economic backdrop provided Chancellor little wriggle room, 'headroom' economic word jour, though still managed strike optimistic tone.
There were changes Personal Allowance, Higher Rate Threshold Dividend Allowance.
Personal Allowance will continue rise line with expectations, £11,850 2018-19 year.
Higher Rate Threshold will rise £46,350, while Dividend Allowance which been concerned about remained £2,000.
plan Corporation reductions remained same.
However, there change note companies that planning sell assets though this won't affect typical IPSE member.
Corporate Indexation Allowance available companies which sell assets capital gain will frozen from January 2018.
Inflation accruing after this date will available companies when calculating value capital gain.
what economic backdrop informing decisions Chancellor?
three main issues Chancellor must grapple with economic growth, productivity public finances.
economic growth, delivered news Chancellor.
Economic growth downgraded expected average cent-per-year over next five years.
next years will largest fall economic growth Brexit-related uncertainty productivity problems downgrading that will cost Treasury billion over five years.

been expected that productivity would have recovered more than has, Chancellor forced recognise this.
productivity causing real-term wage cuts, lower growth more public spending.

This will lead lower receipts Treasury contributing downgraded growth forecast.
finally, shape public finances need considered.
deficit expected reach £49.9 billion full year.
2022-23 expected have fallen from cent GDP, cent.
Whilst improvements public finances welcome, must remain cautious.
downgrading economic growth expected cost billion over five years.
Brexit Divorce Bill amount another billion.

Overall, downgrading growth productivity major problem Chancellor.

time being least, he's resisted tampering with government commitments Personal Allowance, Higher Rate Threshold, Dividend Allowance Corporation Tax.
